author: ⚡️BeyondLimitsNodes⚡️
msg: The biggest problem I see is ULOs don't have the info what UPs are and where to withdraw. So a lot of them give up in a few days.

author: Mat
msg:
#amaquestion  
Re communications: Can the Unity team please look at how comms are managed with the ENOs.  Yes there is delay, but delays are explained in great detail, hard and fast timelines are not given but when the next update will be is always clear. 

Result being I've been waiting A LOT longer for ENOs activation but I'm relaxed about it. Opposed to Unity where I feel like I'm always kept in the dark with surprise drops of progress. The Unity team is creating the frustration in this community through this communication blackout.
